H7200.strongs_def: to see, literally or figuratively (in numerous applications, direct and implied, transitive, intransitive and causative)
H7200.kjv_def: advise self, appear, approve, behold, [idiom] certainly, consider, discern, (make to) enjoy, have experience, gaze, take heed, [idiom] indeed, [idiom] joyfully, lo, look (on, one another, one on another, one upon another, out, up, upon), mark, meet, [idiom] be near, perceive, present, provide, regard, (have) respect, (fore-, cause to, let) see(-r, -m, one another), shew (self), [idiom] sight of others, (e-) spy, stare, [idiom] surely, [idiom] think, view, visions.
H7200.usage: see(879x), look(104x), behold(83x), shew(68x), appear(66x), consider(22x), seer(12x), spy(6x), respect(5x), perceive(5x), provide(4x), regard(4x), enjoy(4x), lo(3x), foreseeth(2x), heed(2x)

H7201.strongs_def: a bird of prey (probably the vulture, from its sharp sight)

H7203.strongs_def: a seer (as often rendered); but also (abstractly) a vision

H7205.derivation: from the imperative of H7200 (רָאָה) and H1121 (בֵּן); see ye a son;

H7206.strongs_def: a Reubenite or descendant of Reuben

H7208.derivation: feminine passive participle of H7213 (רָאַם); raised;

H7210.strongs_def: sight, whether abstractly (vision) or concretely (a spectacle)

H7211.derivation: from H7200 (רָאָה) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has seen;
H7211.strongs_def: Reajah, the name of three Israelites

H7214.derivation: or רְאֵיםlemma רְאיֵם second vowel, corrected to רְאֵים; or רֵים; or רֵם; from H7213 (רָאַם);

H7215.strongs_def: something high in value, i.e. perhaps coral

H7216.derivation: or רָאמֹתxlit Râmôth corrected to Râʼmôth; plural of H7215 (רָאמָה); heights;
H7216.strongs_def: Ramoth, the name of two places in Palestine

H7218.derivation: from an unused root apparently meaning to shake;
H7218.strongs_def: the head (as most easily shaken), whether literal or figurative (in many applications, of place, time, rank, itc.)
H7218.kjv_def: band, beginning, captain, chapiter, chief(-est place, man, things), company, end, [idiom] every (man), excellent, first, forefront, (be-)head, height, (on) high(-est part, (priest)), [idiom] lead, [idiom] poor, principal, ruler, sum, top.
H7218.usage: head(349x), chief(91x), top(73x), beginning(14x), company(12x), captain(10x), sum(9x), first(6x), principal(5x), chapiters(4x), rulers(2x)

H7219.derivation: or רוֹשׁ; (Deuteronomy 32:32), apparently the same as H7218 (רֹאשׁ);
H7219.strongs_def: a poisonous plant, probably the poppy (from its conspicuous head); generally poison (even of serpents)

H7220.strongs_def: Rosh, the name of an Israelite and of a foreign nation

H7223.strongs_def: first, in place, time or rank (as adjective or noun)
H7223.kjv_def: ancestor, (that were) before(-time), beginning, eldest, first, fore(-father) (-most), former (thing), of old time, past.
H7223.usage: first(129x), former(26x), beginning(4x), chief(3x), before(3x), foremost(3x), aforetime(1x)

H7225.strongs_def: the first, in place, time, order or rank (specifically, a firstfruit)
H7225.kjv_def: beginning, chief(-est), first(-fruits, part, time), principal thing.

H7227.strongs_def: abundant (in quantity, size, age, number, rank, quality)
H7227.kjv_def: (in) abound(-undance, -ant, -antly), captain, elder, enough, exceedingly, full, great(-ly, man, one), increase, long (enough, (time)), (do, have) many(-ifold, things, a time), (ship-)master, mighty, more, (too, very) much, multiply(-tude), officer, often(-times), plenteous, populous, prince, process (of time), suffice(-lent).
H7227.usage: many(190x), great(118x), much(36x), captain(24x), more(12x), long(10x), enough(9x), multitude(7x), mighty(5x), greater(4x), greatly(3x)

H7228.derivation: by contraction from H7232 (רָבַב); (or perhaps the same as H7227 (רַב))

H7229.kjv_def: captain, chief, great, lord, master, stout.
H7229.usage: great(9x), master(2x), stout(1x), chief(1x), captain(1x), lord(1x)

H7230.kjv_def: abundance(-antly), all, [idiom] common (sort), excellent, great(-ly, -ness, number), huge, be increased, long, many, more in number, most, much, multitude, plenty(-ifully), [idiom] very (age).
H7230.usage: multitude(70x), abundance(35x), great(9x), greatness(8x), much(8x), abundantly(4x), plenty(3x), many(3x), long(2x), excellent(1x)

H7231.derivation: a primitive root; (compare H7241 (רָבִיב)); also as denominative from H7233 (רְבָבָה);
H7231.strongs_def: properly, to cast together , i.e. increase, especially in number; to multiply by the myriad
H7231.kjv_def: increase, be many(-ifold), be more, multiply, ten thousands.

H7232.derivation: a primitive root (rather identical with H7231 (רָבַב) through the idea of projection);

H7233.strongs_def: abundance (in number), i.e. (specifically) a myriad (whether definite or indefinite)

H7235.kjv_def: (bring in) abundance ([idiom] -antly), [phrase] archer (by mistake for H7232 (רָבַב)), be in authority, bring up, [idiom] continue, enlarge, excel, exceeding(-ly), be full of, (be, make) great(-er, -ly, [idiom] -ness), grow up, heap, increase, be long, (be, give, have, make, use) many (a time), (any, be, give, give the, have) more (in number), (ask, be, be so, gather, over, take, yield) much (greater, more), (make to) multiply, nourish, plenty(-eous), [idiom] process (of time), sore, store, thoroughly, very.
H7235.usage: multiply(74x), increase(40x), much(29x), many(28x), more(12x), great(8x), long(3x), store(2x), exceedingly(2x), greater(2x), abundance(2x)

H7237.strongs_def: Rabbah, the name of two places in Palestine, East and West

H7238.derivation: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to H7235 (רָבָה);

H7239.derivation: from H7231 (רָבַב); or רִבּוֹא from H7231 (רָבַב);
H7239.strongs_def: a myriad, i.e. indefinitely, large number
H7239.kjv_def: great things, ten ((eight) -een, (for) -ty, [phrase] sixscore, [phrase] threescore, [idiom] twenty, (twen) -ty) thousand.

H7241.strongs_def: a rain (as an accumulation of drops)

H7242.strongs_def: a collar (as spread around the neck)

H7247.derivation: from an unused root meaning to be fruitful; fertile;

H7248.derivation: from H7227 (רַב) and a foreign word for a Magian; chief Magian;

H7249.derivation: from H7227 (רַב) and a foreign word for a eunuch; chief chamberlain;

H7250.strongs_def: to squat or lie out flat, i.e. (specifically) in copulation

H7251.derivation: a primitive root (rather identical with H7250 (רָבַע) through the idea of sprawling 'at all fours' (or possibly the reverse is the order of deriv.); compare H702 (אַרְבַּע)); properly, to be four (sided); used only as denominative of H7253 (רֶבַע);

H7256.strongs_def: a descendant of the fourth generation, i.e. great great grandchild

H7257.strongs_def: to crouch (on all four legs folded, like a recumbent animal); be implication, to recline, repose, brood, lurk, imbed
H7257.kjv_def: crouch (down), fall down, make a fold, lay, (cause to, make to) lie (down), make to rest, sit.

H7258.strongs_def: a couch or place of repose
H7258.kjv_def: where each lay, lie down in, resting place.

H7259.derivation: from an unused root probably meaning to clog by tying up the fetlock; fettering (by beauty);

H7262.derivation: from H7227 (רַב) and H8248 (שָׁקָה); chief butler;

H7263.derivation: from an unused root meaning to pile together;

H7264.strongs_def: to quiver (with any violent emotion, especially anger or fear)
H7264.kjv_def: be afraid, stand in awe, disquiet, fall out, fret, move, provoke, quake, rage, shake, tremble, trouble, be wroth.
H7264.usage: tremble(12x), move(7x), rage(5x), shake(3x), disquiet(3x), troubled(3x), quake(2x), afraid(1x)

H7265.strongs_def: {to quiver (with any violent emotion, especially anger or fear)}

H7267.strongs_def: commotion, restlessness (of a horse), crash (of thunder), disquiet, anger
H7267.usage: trouble(2x), troubling(1x), noise(1x), rage(1x), fear(1x), wrath(1x)

H7270.derivation: a primitive root;  also as denominative from H7272 (רֶגֶל)
H7270.strongs_def: to walk along; but only in specifically, applications, to reconnoiter, to be atale-bearer (i.e. slander); to lead about
H7270.kjv_def: backbite, search, slander, (e-) spy (out), teach to go, view.

H7271.strongs_def: {a foot, a step; by euphemistically the pudenda}

H7272.strongs_def: a foot (as used in walking); by implication, a step; by euphemistically the pudenda
H7272.kjv_def: [idiom] be able to endure, [idiom] according as, [idiom] after, [idiom] coming, [idiom] follow, (broken-)foot(-ed, -stool), [idiom] great toe, [idiom] haunt, [idiom] journey, leg, [phrase] piss, [phrase] possession, time.
H7272.usage: feet(216x), after(4x), times(4x), follow(4x), toes(2x), journey(1x), legs(1x)

H7274.derivation: plural of active participle of H7270 (רָגַל); fullers (as tramping the cloth in washing);
H7274.strongs_def: Rogelim, a place East of the Jordan

H7275.derivation: a primitive root (compare H7263 (רֶגֶב), H7321 (רוּעַ), H7551 (רָקַם));
H7275.strongs_def: to cast together (stones), i.e. to lapidate

H7277.derivation: feminine of the same as H7276 (רֶגֶם);
H7277.strongs_def: a pile (of stones), i.e. (figuratively) a throng

H7278.derivation: from H7276 (רֶגֶם) and H4428 (מֶלֶךְ); king's heap;

H7280.strongs_def: properly, to toss violently and suddenly (the sea with waves, the skin with boils); figuratively (in a favorable manner) to settle, i.e. quiet; specifically, to wink (from the motion of the eye-lids)
H7280.kjv_def: break, divide, find ease, be a moment, (cause, give, make to) rest, make suddenly.
H7280.usage: rest(5x), divide(3x), suddenly(2x), broken(1x), ease(1x), moment(1x)

H7281.strongs_def: a wink (of the eyes), i.e. a very short space of time

H7286.strongs_def: to tread in pieces, i.e. (figuratively) to conquer, or (specifically) to overlay

H7287.strongs_def: to tread down, i.e. subjugate; specifically, to crumble off
H7287.kjv_def: (come to, make to) have dominion, prevail against, reign, (bear, make to) rule,(-r, over), take.
H7287.usage: rule(13x), dominion(9x), take(2x), prevaileth(1x), reign(1x), ruler(1x)

H7289.derivation: from H7286 (רָדַד) in the sense of spreading;

H7290.strongs_def: to stun, i.e. stupefy (with sleep or death)
H7290.kjv_def: (be fast a-, be in a deep, cast into a dead, that) sleep(-er, -eth).

H7291.strongs_def: to run after (usually with hostile intent; figuratively (of time) gone by)
H7291.kjv_def: chase, put to flight, follow (after, on), hunt, (be under) persecute(-ion, -or), pursue(-r).
H7291.usage: pursue(74x), persecute(20x), follow(18x), chase(13x), persecutors(7x), pursuer(6x), flight(1x)

H7292.strongs_def: to urge severely, i.e. (figuratively) importune, embolden, capture, act insolently
H7292.kjv_def: overcome, behave self proudly, make sure, strengthen.

H7294.strongs_def: Rahab (i.e. boaster), an epithet of Egypt

H7298.derivation: from an unused root apparently meaning to hollow out;
H7298.strongs_def: a channel or watering-box; by resemblance a ringlet of hair (as forming parallel lines)

H7299.derivation: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to H7200 (רָאָה);
